first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions correctly identify the candidate as a strong but poorly matched web/full-stack engineer, citing the same critical skill gaps (Japanese, embedded C, kernel/networking). The minor differences in phrasing are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in assessment based on the altered employer names.
